description: Load built-in default configuration from data/defaults.toml (defaults.py:1)

key_interfaces.name: load_defaults
key_interfaces.description: Load and cache the defaults.toml file (module-level cache)

key_interfaces.name: default_channels
key_interfaces.description: Return default IRC channels list from defaults.toml

key_interfaces.name: default_runner
key_interfaces.description: Return default runner name from defaults.toml

key_interfaces.name: default_mcp_server_cmd
key_interfaces.description: Return default MCP server command list from defaults.toml

key_interfaces.name: server_presets
key_interfaces.description: Return server presets dict {name: {host, port, tls, label}} from defaults.toml

user_flows.name: load defaults
steps: return cached dict on subsequent calls
